front.title: BGP Usage for SD-WAN Overlay Networks

abstract.t: This document illustrates how a BGP-based control plane can be used to manage large scale Software Defined WAN (SD-WAN) overlay networks by distributing edge service reachability information, WAN port attributes, and underlay path details, thereby minimizing manual provisioning. In such deployments, BGP can provide a standards-based mechanism for distributing information that may otherwise be exchanged using proprietary SD-WAN control-plane mechanisms.
